response:
Hello Team,  
Thank you for your time during our session. During the session, we successfully rolled back the change that was implemented this morning when the issue was occurring. Testing was carried out, and it was confirmed that the GP connection(s) are functioning as expected. In addition to the rollback, the team also performed push configuration changes to the PA-5450s DG and RNs. These changes were confirmed as successful and are operating as intended.
